stacksizeconf.configuration.title: %s — Settings
stacksizeconf.reset_module.tooltip: Restore every option in this section to defaults
stacksizeconf.reset_all.tooltip: Reset all mod settings to defaults (including key binding)
stacksizeconf.config.light_overlay_verti: Overlay vertical range (± blocks from feet)
stacksizeconf.config.light_overlay_hotke: Click the left button, then press a key or mouse button; Esc cancels. You can also change this under Controls.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.enableStackSiz: When off, vanilla stack sizes and stackability are used.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.stackSizeMulti:
After the non-stackable base below, multiply each item's vanilla max stack by this factor.
1.0 keeps vanilla counts; 2.0 doubles (e.g. 64 → 128), still capped globally.
Default: 2.0
Range: 0.05 ~ 1024.0
stacksizeconf.config.desc.nonStackableBa:
For items that stack to 1 in vanilla, use this as the base before the multiplier.
Merging still requires identical item data.
Default: 64
Range: 1 ~ 65536
stacksizeconf.config.desc.maxStackHardCa:
Final stack size is never larger than this (global ceiling).
Default: 1024
Range: 1 ~ 65536
stacksizeconf.config.desc.enableItemMagn: When off, nearby dropped items are not auto-picked.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.itemMagnetRang:
Search radius around the player for dropped items to auto-pick (in blocks).
Default: 6.0
Range: 1.0 ~ 64.0
stacksizeconf.config.desc.enableHandheld: When enabled, a shulker box in hand can be opened directly without placing it.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.shulkerOpenReq: If enabled, handheld open only triggers while sneaking.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.shulkerOpenAll: If enabled, opening from offhand is also allowed.
If enabled, opening is allowed while riding or flying.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.shulkerOpenPla: Play container open sound for handheld shulker box.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.shulkerOpenSer: When enabled, the server re-validates open conditions for multiplayer consistency.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.enableLightLev:
When off, the light overlay hotkey does nothing and nothing is drawn (client only).
Block vs combined brightness is controlled by "Overlay value mode" below.
stacksizeconf.config.desc.lightOverlayBr:
BLOCK: torch/glowstone etc. only — 0 at night outdoors with no sources (good for where to place lights).
COMBINED: matches vanilla getMaxLocalRawBrightness (includes sky after day/night darken; often ~4 on the surface at night with no torches).
stacksizeconf.config.desc.lightLevelOver:
Horizontal extent in blocks from the player (square, Chebyshev radius). Larger values show more blocks.
Default: 16
Range: 4 ~ 48

How many blocks above/below the feet block Y to scan for floor surfaces to label.
Default: 3
Range: 0 ~ 16
stacksizeconf.config.enable_direct_xp_ab: Direct XP absorption (no orb when player nearby)
stacksizeconf.config.desc.enableDirectXp:
When enabled, experience that would spawn as orbs is given to the nearest non-spectator player within the radius below (Mending runs first, same as picking up an orb). If nobody is in range, vanilla orbs still spawn.
Default: on
stacksizeconf.config.desc.directXpAbsorp:
Spherical distance from the orb spawn position to search for the nearest player.
Default: 8.0
Range: 0.5 ~ 64.0
